name: Blue Cheese and Port Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to your normal baking temperature.
2. In a large bowl, combine the water, bread flour, sugar, salt, butter, port red wine, blue cheese, walnuts, and applesauce.
3. Mix until well combined.
4. Transfer the dough to a greased 9x5 inch loaf pan.
5. Cover and let rise for about 1 hour at room temperature.
6. Place the loaf in the oven on your regular baking cycle setting.
7. Bake according to your preferred method (e.g., bake at 350°F/175°C for 30-40 minutes, or until golden brown).
